testcases.input: message = "short message", limit = 15 Output: ["short mess<1/2>","age<2/2>"] Explanation: Under the given constraints, the string can be split into two parts: - The first part comprises of the first 10 characters, and has a length 15. - The next part comprises of the last 3 characters, and has a length 8.
